hero.title: Matched to your skills.
hero.subtitle: Steps and projects picked for what you’re good at — and where you are. Remote work is matched on the languages you speak instead.

basis.ariaLabel: What these matches are based on
basis.noSkills: No skills on your profile yet

emptyProfile.title: Tell us what you’re good at.
emptyProfile.description: Matches are built from the skills on your profile. Add a few — any skill counts, not just technical ones — and matches will appear here.

emptyFiltered.title: No matches with those filters.
emptyFiltered.description: Try turning off “Remote only”, clearing the search — or add more skills to your profile to see more matches.

groups.strongSub: {count} — they need a skill you already have
groups.adjacentSub: {count} — in the same skill areas, a chance to learn something new

why.needsSkills: Needs {skills} — you have {count, plural, one {it} other {both}}
